column1: # Manual indicator readings — Indian market session 2026-05-14
# Fill the `expected_value` column with what YOU see on your chart.
# Leave bot_value and delta blank — `python scripts/compare_indicators.py` fills those.
# Columns:
#   reading_time_ist  HH:MM IST when you took the reading from your chart
#                     (the latest 5m bar moves second-to-second
#   symbol            bare NSE symbol — BHARTIARTL
#   timeframe         5m / 15m / 60m / 1d
#   indicator         RSI / MACD / MACD_signal / MACD_hist / ATR / ADX /
#                     DI_plus / DI_minus / VWAP / Stoch_K / Stoch_D / CCI /
#                     MFI / CMF / BB_upper / BB_middle / BB_lower / BB_percent_B /
#                     volume_ratio / volume_surge_ratio / supertrend / supertrend_dir /
#                     pivot / R1 / S1 / PDH / PDL / price / open / high / low /
#                     close / volume
#   expected_value    what your chart shows (number; 1.0/-1.0 for supertrend_dir)
#   bot_value         leave blank — script fills
#   delta             leave blank — script computes (expected − bot)
#   source            TV / Fyers / Kite / Dhan / Investing / Chartink / other
#   notes             optional — e.g. "after 11:45 candle close"
# Add more rows as you go. Delete rows you don't have data for. Order doesn't matter.
reading_time_ist
